Virat Kohli’s Cricket Preparation at 37

Dec 2, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Virat Kohli’s Preparation and Mental Edge at 37

Virat Kohli continues to dominate international cricket, combining rigorous preparation with unmatched mental focus. Returning from a month-long break, he scored his 52nd ODI and 83rd international century, smashing 135 off 120 balls against South Africa in the series opener.
